headline: Coca Cola Leadership Shift Puts Focus On Cash Allocation And Dividends
summary: Henrique Braun has been appointed CEO of Coca-Cola, effective at the end of March. Current CEO James Quincey will transition to the role of Executive Chairman. The leadership change comes at a time when NYSE:KO shares are trading at $77.04. Coca-Cola, listed as NYSE:KO, is preparing for a leadership handoff as Henrique Braun steps into the CEO role and James Quincey becomes Executive Chairman. The move arrives with the stock at $77.04 and multi year returns that include 42.4% over 3 years...

headline: Had You Invested $1,000 in Coca-Cola or PepsiCo 10 Years Ago, Here’s What You’d Have Today
summary: On the surface, PepsiCo (NYSE: PEP) might appear to offer more diversification. It sells beverages and snacks, with iconic brands like Frito-Lay, Doritos, Gatorade, and Quaker sitting alongside its cola lineup. More diversification should mean more resilience. Over the past decade, though, that logic has not held up at the stock level. Coca-Cola (NYSE: KO) ... Had You Invested $1,000 in Coca-Cola or PepsiCo 10 Years Ago, Here’s What You’d Have Today

headline: Berkshire CEO Greg Abel on working with Buffett, Kraft Heinz and using all his salary to buy the stock

headline: The $200 Billion Question: Is Amazon Finally Ready to Pay a Dividend?
summary: Will Amazon pay a dividend? I'll explain AMZN’s $200B AI spend, the peer pressure within the MAG7 lineup, and whether the company can actually pay a dividend at this point.
